message:
feat(ad): implement full VJP suite for remaining primitives and expand LAX/tensor ops

Major expansion of the automatic differentiation system and supporting
tensor operations:

AD VJP implementations (fj-ad — +1023 lines):
- DynamicUpdateSlice: proper gradient decomposition into operand and
  update components via slicing and zeroing
- Cumsum: reverse cumulative sum along the cumsum axis for tensor
  gradients (scalar passthrough preserved)
- Conv: convolution VJP with input gradient via transposed convolution
  and kernel gradient via cross-correlation
- Dot/DotGeneral: matrix transpose-based gradient computation for
  general tensor contractions
- Reduce (sum/max/min/prod): axis-aware gradient broadcasting for
  sum, selector-based gradients for max/min, and product-rule
  gradients for prod
- Iota: zero gradient (discrete operation)
- Select: gradient routing to selected branch only
- Sort: inverse-permutation gradient reordering
- Clamp: indicator-function gradient masking for in-range elements
- BroadcastInDim: gradient summation over broadcast dimensions
- Complete the full set of XLA-compatible VJP rules

LAX operations (fj-lax — +140 lines):
- Add clamp() for element-wise min/max bounding
- Add where_op() (select) for conditional tensor selection
- Add tie_in() for control dependency annotation
- Add stop_gradient() for gradient barrier insertion
- Add conv_general_dilated() for general N-D convolution with
  padding, stride, and dilation parameters

Tensor ops (fj-lax/tensor_ops — +156 lines):
- Add element-wise floor_divide and remainder operations
- Add logical_not, logical_and, logical_or for boolean tensors
- Add bitwise_and, bitwise_or, bitwise_xor, bitwise_not for integer
  tensors
- Add left_shift, right_shift for bit manipulation
- Add population_count for Hamming weight computation

Trace (fj-trace):
- Fix trace recording annotation for conv operation metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
